name: Mid Eastern Lamb Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 28 oz can whole or ground tomatoes
1/2 cup Dry sherry or chicken stock
1 tsp Each allspice, cinnamon and turmeric
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste. Garnish with parsley if desired (optional).
Trim excess fat from the lamb.
Cut meat into 1 inch cubes.
Brown lamb in oil for 5 minutes or until browned. Stir in onions and garlic. Cover and cook for 3-5 minutes until onions are soft. Stir in all ingredients except salt, pepper, raisins, and parsley. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for approximately 40 minutes or until tender. Add raisins and simmer for an additional 10-20 minutes. Season with salt and pepper before serving.
